testcase.name: handleRuntimeException_ShouldReturnBadRequest

testcase.name: handleValidationExceptions_ShouldReturnMapOfErrors
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-18T16:44:24.707+05:30 WARN 10236 --- [admin-service] [ main] c.s.a.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed for admin request: null
